input: Run dependency analysis on this project
expected_behavior: Skill activates and produces the expected dependency analysis output following the defined process
Skill recognizes the trigger phrase and executes the dependency analysis workflow

input: Apply dependency analysis to analyze the current codebase with detailed output
expected_behavior: Skill produces comprehensive dependency analysis analysis with evidence-tagged findings
Skill activates with minimal input, applies reasonable defaults

input: What is the weather forecast for tomorrow?
expected_behavior: Skill should NOT activate — this input has no relation to dependency analysis
